history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, low-resolution image shows a person covering part of their face with one hand while large bold text overlays the center.

The main subject appears to be a person shown from the forehead down to the mouth area, with one hand raised toward the face and the other side of the head turned slightly. Their hair appears dark on top with lighter or blond hair visible on the right side of the frame.

The setting is unclear, but the background looks like a bright outdoor sky with blue tones and some indistinct green or foliage-like shapes in the upper left. Lighting appears natural and strong, consistent with daylight.

The image is framed tightly and cropped so only part of the person’s head and hand are visible. The overlaid text is centered and very large, with a white fill, black outline, and a slight drop-shadow effect, spanning across the middle of the image.

Visible Text:
AYOYO

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a person raising a hand near their face. Bold overlay text reading “AYOYO” is placed across the center.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

AYOYO

# Structured Version

- **AYOYO**

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
